microsoft_ft: Served as **post-sale technical lead** for Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp platform integrations on Azure, owning end-to-end execution plans that drove **$14M+ in enterprise customer impact** and accelerated workload go-live across all recovery validation use cases.

Scaled Azure's resilience delivery program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized, self-service system**, standardizing onboarding and enablement workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and support healthy, production-grade consumption across strategic accounts.

Built and owned a **technical account strategy** for sovereign-cloud network isolation tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, serving as the accountable bridge lead across 14 cross-org execution teams under direct executive visibility and strict KPI reporting cadence.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a full drill program in **4 months at 94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous production validation at scale.

Directed executive and operational governance across complex multi-stakeholder programs, creating certainty from ambiguity by orchestrating Shared Services, Support, and Engineering escalation paths to **resolve critical production issues** before customer go-live milestones.

Accelerated delivery capacity by **39% planning cycle reduction** and 21% drill throughput growth through an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows, enabling the team to service more concurrent use cases without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed **platform adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows across Azure service teams, conducting structured enablement sessions and user demos that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** in recurring toil.

Conducted **11+ open-ended discovery workshops** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation and align delivery with real customer use case demand.

Accelerated data retrieval and **Lakehouse-style documentation access** by migrating internal knowledge assets to an AI-powered semantic search platform with rigorous metadata standards, reducing lookup time by 83% and improving cross-team enablement velocity.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, orchestrating stakeholder buy-in across 140+ engineering and operations teams toward a shared delivery roadmap.

Led discovery across 20+ Azure service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual operational toil per region launch**, then built a strategic roadmap to automate critical execution paths, directly reducing go-live risk and improving time-to-healthy-consumption for enterprise customers.

Engineered a **Power BI governance dashboard** to surface automation gaps and operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to make data-driven prioritization decisions and track KPIs on delivery health and use case progression in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping all dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and creating a phased execution plan that minimized production risk at each go-live milestone.

Orchestrated cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable delivery foundation for future platform adoption at robotics sites.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives as the **accountable delivery lead**, resolving 40+ high-priority backlog tickets and stabilizing the developer intake process to sustain consistent throughput and on-time use case delivery across the program.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end scoping, proposal, and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly customer engagements through a redesigned CRM process, improving pipeline visibility and reducing time-to-close on high-value accounts.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and improved conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google Business profile to align outreach with the highest-value customer segments.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and surface pricing model gaps, delivering actionable recommendations to leadership that strengthened unit economics and improved ROI attribution to specific service lines.
